programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.desc: Un jet privato viene scosso da un violento impatto sopra la foresta amazzonica.

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E13 - Countdown the Best Hunts
programme.desc: Laramy thinks back over his favorite hunts throughout the series, and gives a heartfelt farewell.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E01 - Manny Goes Medieval
programme.desc: Manny demonstrates his medieval skills, taking a huge wild boar with Viking-style spears.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E02 - Drought and Danger
programme.desc: Manny investigates how severe drought has caused wildlife to congregate near any water.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E03 - Black Bear Explosion
programme.desc: Manny explores a Florida swamp swarming with black bears.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S02:E02 - The Heart of the Conflict
programme.desc: Investigating a string of murdered lions, Ivan gets to the very heart of an ancient conflict between humans and lions. The outcome will test Ivan's own core values about cultural

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E01 - American Icons
programme.desc: American buffalo are being caught and researched with the assistance of American motocross champ Ryan Villopoto.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E02 - Big Move
programme.desc: Ivan is off to Zimbabwe to team up with conservationists focusing on capturing and relocating 100 elephants.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus
programme.desc: A group of conservationists are observing a family of black bears in the wooded hills of Oklahoma, and Ivan gets to meet them.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E10 - Mountain Lion
programme.desc: Known to attack from above, Mountain Lion can quickly change from hunted, to hunter. Laramy must keep his guard up as he stalks through these trees in search for a cat he calls Elk-Killer.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E11 - Alaska Deer Part 2

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E12 - Trapping
programme.desc: Laramy shows his trapping skills as he traps for all sorts of critters near his mountain home.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E13 - Countdown the Best Hunts
programme.desc: Laramy thinks back over his favorite hunts throughout the series, and gives a heartfelt farewell.

programme.desc: Manny demonstrates his medieval skills, taking a huge wild boar with Viking-style spears.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy
programme.desc: Reflecting on Diana's legacy, this show delves into what Princess Diana left behind after her sudden passing - the impression she left on her children, the royal family, and the people who loved her. The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E13 - William And Kate One Year On

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Sorge un nuovo sole sul ristorante di Hell’s Kitchen. I Sous chef raggiungono gli alloggi e comunicano alle due brigate di vestirsi in borghese.Oggi i cuochi non dovranno cucinare, qualcun altro lo farà per loro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le brigate preparano piatti religiosi, con la rossa che vince. Nella prova individuale, i concorrenti usano due ingredienti con uno scelto tra rabarbaro, chorizo, salsa di soia e chicchi di caffè.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Sorge il sole e mentre i cuochi si svegliano negli alloggi, nel ristorante di Hell’s Kitchen si suona.Ospite d’eccezione, per la prova a squadre di oggi, è Manuel Agnelli, frontman degli Afterhours e giudice di X Factor.I cuochi dovranno ascoltare e indovinare i generi musicali dei brani che interpreterà al pianoforte Manuel: ogni squadra dovrà poi realizzare due piatti ispirandosi ai generi indovinati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: E’ il giorno della semifinale a Hell’s Kitchen: i 5 cuochi rimasti hanno conquistato le giacche nere e da questo momento, dovranno contare solo sulle proprie abilità per dimostrare a Chef Cracco di poter diventare un Executive Chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dopo un servizio turbolento a cena, un furioso Gordon è costretto a prendere le redini in mano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I tre cuochi in gara si alternano dirigendo la cucina per il servizio della cena.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: È il momento della sfida finale. Chi sceglierà Gordon come vincitore di quest'anno?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La puntata inizia con un "triello" sulla pasta gourmet giudicato da Eleonora Cozzella. Mohamed vince e diventa executive chef. Erika e Tommaso si sfidano con il loro ingrediente preferito. Erika vince e va in finale contro Mohamed, creando un menu con una brigata di ex concorrenti e ospiti come Manuel Agnelli e Le Donatella.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Inizia una nuova edizione di Hell’s Kitchen.Chef Carlo Cracco si trova davanti un plotone di 20 nuovi cuochi che vogliono affrontare il percorso all’interno del suo ristorante. Di questi 20 solo 14 però possono entrare a far parte delle brigate rosse e blu. I 14 vincitori affrontano il primo servizio e la prima eliminazione.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La prima prova che affrontano le due squadre vede protagoniste le erbe aromatiche e le ricette dello Chef Cristiano Tomei, una stella Michelin. Lo Chef sarà anche seduto al tavolo speciale durante il servizio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La prima prova di questa puntata vede protagonisti la Pina e il marito Emiliano Pepe. Dovranno cucinare un piatto famoso guidati dai cuochi delle due squadre.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi di Hell’s Kitchen dovranno affrontarsi in una prova particolare: non potranno usare acqua nella creazione di tre piatti, ma solo liquidi alternativi.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu è contrariato dopo aver perso diverse partite a nascondino. | Dopo essere stato egoista, Pingu si sente escluso quando la sua famiglia stende il bucato. | Pingu convince suo padre ad andare a scalare una montagna dopo aver trovato una vecchia foto.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu va a pescare e promette di tornare in tempo per cena. | Pingu e Pinga giocano, ma all'arrivo di Pingi, Pingu decide di essere troppo grande per i giochi e preferisce mettersi in mostra. | Pingu escogita un piano per tenere la neve lontana dall'auto del papà.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu ha il giorno libero da scuola e vuole godersi la libertà invece di aiutare la mamma. | Pingu combina qualche guaio dopo aver trovato arco e frecce. | Pingu ignora un avvertimento su dove far volare l'aquilone vicino al vicino irritabile e deve recuperarlo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu scopre una calamita e decide di usarla per ingannare il suo amico. | Pingu gioca con la sua barchetta, ma affonda a causa di una falla. | Dopo essersi addormentato mentre giocava, Pingu fa un sogno davvero dolce.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu fa uno scherzo pericoloso al nonno. | Pingu e Pinga costruiscono il loro aereo dopo averne visto uno vero. | Pingu prende in giro sua sorella con i suoi scherzi fino a farla piangere.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vede un set di magia in negozio e lo vuole davvero. | Pingu scopre un grande regalo il giorno del suo compleanno. Vuole aprirlo ma gli dicono che deve aspettare. | Quando papà insiste affinché Pingu metta ogni cosa al suo posto, Pingu si organizza.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vede in un libro una torre che arriva al cielo e vuole costruirne una uguale. | Pinga scopre un libro sui regni e Pingu pensa che sarebbe fantastico essere un re. | Pingu vuole preparare la sua torta.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Il braccio dell'orsacchiotto di Pinga si stacca mentre Pingu ci gioca. | Pingu va a piedi ad aiutare il nonno per i ritardi della motoslitta. | Pingu inciampa sui giocattoli, ha un brutto viaggio verso scuola e non sa rispondere alle domande del maestro.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Facendo il gradasso, Pingu scommette con Pinga che è più bravo di lei a colpire un barattolo con delle palline. | Pingu va malissimo alla giornata sportiva. Quando si ferma per aiutare un amico nell'ultima gara, Pingu vince il primo premio. | Pingu è felice di ricevere un biglietto di San Valentino.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu deve proteggere Pinga quando cammina nel sonno fuori dall'igloo ed entra nelle case altrui. | Pingu rimbalza su tutto nell'igloo, dal letto alle poltrone. | Pingu prende in giro sua sorella e il suo coniglio giocattolo preferito cade dalla finestra.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu e Pinga stendono il bucato. Quando una folata di vento prende gli asciugamani, si mettono a inseguirli. | Guardare un gabbiano in volo fa venire a Pingu voglia di volare. | Dopo che papà ha spalato la neve dal suo carretto, Pingu scava un po' anche lui.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Papà cerca di costruire un tavolo, ma passa il tempo a tenere Pingu lontano dalla sua cassetta degli attrezzi. | Pingu va sullo snowboard con Robby e vorrebbe essere bravo nei salti quanto il suo amico. | Il nonno parla a Pingu della luna e lui vuole disperatamente visitarla.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu e Pinga dormono in tenda e Pingu cerca di spaventarla. | Pinga ha il singhiozzo e Pingu cerca di farlo passare spaventandola. | Pingu va a pesca con papà e scopre che papà non ha sempre ragione.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Tutti, tranne Pingu, partecipano alla gara di sculture. | Pingu e papà provano a gonfiare un palloncino, ma è dura. | Pingu e Pinga fanno impazzire la mamma usando tutto come tamburo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vuole usare la macchina per maglieria della mamma. Quando lei riposa, Pingu ne approfitta per sferruzzare a più non posso! | È ora di dormire, ma Pingu e Pinga giocano ancora fuori. | Pingu e Pinga giocano a rincorrersi. Pingu crede di essere scappato, ma resta bloccato.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu e Pinga trovano degli adesivi nella loro scatola di cereali e iniziano a etichettare le cose. | Pingu sa di essere nei guai quando rompe il campanello dell'igloo. | Robby è estremamente bravo a far stare in equilibrio un pesce sulla punta del naso.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu fa cadere una bottiglia di latte che rotola in un burrone ghiacciato. | Pingu prepara frittelle, ma la pastella vola ovunque mentre cerca di girarle.| La mamma serve pappa di pesce per cena – e a Pingu non piace per niente l'odore!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu scopre che più lontano fa rotolare le sue palle di neve, più diventano grandi. | Pingu usa un tubo e un imbuto per fare scherzi alla sua famiglia e ai suoi amici. | Pingu vuole provare il tornio del nonno, ma le sue ceramiche non sono neanche lontanamente belle come quelle del nonno.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Quando Pingu e Pinga giocano in modo troppo turbolento, rovinano il cappello nuovo della mamma. | Pingu getta l'involucro a terra; tutti lo imitano, creando disordine.| Pingu è un tipo un po' scatenato quando si tratta di andare in slitta.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu è geloso delle attenzioni che riceve la sorella malata... così finge di essere malato anche lui! | Pingu e Pinga decidono di fare uno scherzo a sorpresa alla mamma mettendo Pinga in una vecchia scatola. | Pingu è invitato a una festa di compleanno, ma non vuole che anche Pinga ci vada.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: L'insegnante di Pingu sta mostrando alla classe come creare forme di cartapesta, e Pingu e i suoi amici ne sono colpiti. | Pingu non ne ha mai abbastanza dei suoi snack al pesce preferiti. | Papà dà a Pingu una lezione di guida, ma Pingu rompe accidentalmente la leva della velocità.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vuole un nuovo giocattolo, ma la mamma non glielo compra mentre fanno la spesa. | Pingu è incaricato di prendersi cura dell'animale della scuola. È un granchio scontroso a cui non piace Pingu. | Pingu semina il caos quando è costretto ad accompagnare la mamma al salone di bellezza.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Quando Pinga si batte il dito del piede, Pingu si diverte un mondo a fasciare il piede dolorante e a farla ridacchiare. | Pingu trova un flauto magico, ma nessuno sembra apprezzare i suoi rumorosi fischi... tranne i pesci! | Pingi sembra preferire giocare con Pingo che con Pingu.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu promette di catturare un pesce GRANDE per la mamma, ma nei buchi per la pesca, pesca solo spazzatura! | Pingu gioca con le bretelle del nonno, correndo finché l'elastico non lo tira indietro. | Pingu ottiene un lavoro come giornalaio e non vede l'ora di iniziare.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sta dipingendo quando rovescia accidentalmente della vernice rossa e la situazione sfugge rapidamente al controllo. | Pingu vede un nuovo monopattino, ma Pingg lo compra per primo! | Pingu prova a tuffarsi per impressionare gli amici, ma scopre che non è affatto facile come sembra!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vuole far credere a Pinga che ci sia un abominevole uomo delle nevi in giro per l'Antartide. | Pingu sente una nuova canzone alla radio e non ne ha mai abbastanza. | Un amico di Pingu porta a scuola un aeroplanino a elastico e Pingu sostituisce l'elastico in modo che l'aereo voli più lontano.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu va a pescare e promette di tornare in tempo per cena. | Pingu e Pinga giocano, ma all'arrivo di Pingi, Pingu decide di essere troppo grande per i giochi e preferisce mettersi in mostra. | Pingu escogita un piano per tenere la neve lontana dall'auto del papà.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu ha il giorno libero da scuola e vuole godersi la libertà invece di aiutare la mamma. | Pingu combina qualche guaio dopo aver trovato arco e frecce. | Pingu ignora un avvertimento su dove far volare l'aquilone vicino al vicino irritabile e deve recuperarlo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu scopre una calamita e decide di usarla per ingannare il suo amico. | Pingu gioca con la sua barchetta, ma affonda a causa di una falla. | Dopo essersi addormentato mentre giocava, Pingu fa un sogno davvero dolce.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu fa uno scherzo pericoloso al nonno. | Pingu e Pinga costruiscono il loro aereo dopo averne visto uno vero. | Pingu prende in giro sua sorella con i suoi scherzi fino a farla piangere.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vede un set di magia in negozio e lo vuole davvero. | Pingu scopre un grande regalo il giorno del suo compleanno. Vuole aprirlo ma gli dicono che deve aspettare. | Quando papà insiste affinché Pingu metta ogni cosa al suo posto, Pingu si organizza.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vede in un libro una torre che arriva al cielo e vuole costruirne una uguale. | Pinga scopre un libro sui regni e Pingu pensa che sarebbe fantastico essere un re. | Pingu vuole preparare la sua torta.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Il braccio dell'orsacchiotto di Pinga si stacca mentre Pingu ci gioca. | Pingu va a piedi ad aiutare il nonno per i ritardi della motoslitta. | Pingu inciampa sui giocattoli, ha un brutto viaggio verso scuola e non sa rispondere alle domande del maestro.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Facendo il gradasso, Pingu scommette con Pinga che è più bravo di lei a colpire un barattolo con delle palline. | Pingu va malissimo alla giornata sportiva. Quando si ferma per aiutare un amico nell'ultima gara, Pingu vince il primo premio. | Pingu è felice di ricevere un biglietto di San Valentino.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu deve proteggere Pinga quando cammina nel sonno fuori dall'igloo ed entra nelle case altrui. | Pingu rimbalza su tutto nell'igloo, dal letto alle poltrone. | Pingu prende in giro sua sorella e il suo coniglio giocattolo preferito cade dalla finestra.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu e Pinga stendono il bucato. Quando una folata di vento prende gli asciugamani, si mettono a inseguirli. | Guardare un gabbiano in volo fa venire a Pingu voglia di volare. | Dopo che papà ha spalato la neve dal suo carretto, Pingu scava un po' anche lui.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Papà cerca di costruire un tavolo, ma passa il tempo a tenere Pingu lontano dalla sua cassetta degli attrezzi. | Pingu va sullo snowboard con Robby e vorrebbe essere bravo nei salti quanto il suo amico. | Il nonno parla a Pingu della luna e lui vuole disperatamente visitarla.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu e Pinga dormono in tenda e Pingu cerca di spaventarla. | Pinga ha il singhiozzo e Pingu cerca di farlo passare spaventandola. | Pingu va a pesca con papà e scopre che papà non ha sempre ragione.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Tutti, tranne Pingu, partecipano alla gara di sculture. | Pingu e papà provano a gonfiare un palloncino, ma è dura. | Pingu e Pinga fanno impazzire la mamma usando tutto come tamburo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vuole usare la macchina per maglieria della mamma. Quando lei riposa, Pingu ne approfitta per sferruzzare a più non posso! | È ora di dormire, ma Pingu e Pinga giocano ancora fuori. | Pingu e Pinga giocano a rincorrersi. Pingu crede di essere scappato, ma resta bloccato.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu e Pinga trovano degli adesivi nella loro scatola di cereali e iniziano a etichettare le cose. | Pingu sa di essere nei guai quando rompe il campanello dell'igloo. | Robby è estremamente bravo a far stare in equilibrio un pesce sulla punta del naso.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu fa cadere una bottiglia di latte che rotola in un burrone ghiacciato. | Pingu prepara frittelle, ma la pastella vola ovunque mentre cerca di girarle.| La mamma serve pappa di pesce per cena – e a Pingu non piace per niente l'odore!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu scopre che più lontano fa rotolare le sue palle di neve, più diventano grandi. | Pingu usa un tubo e un imbuto per fare scherzi alla sua famiglia e ai suoi amici. | Pingu vuole provare il tornio del nonno, ma le sue ceramiche non sono neanche lontanamente belle come quelle del nonno.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Quando Pingu e Pinga giocano in modo troppo turbolento, rovinano il cappello nuovo della mamma. | Pingu getta l'involucro a terra; tutti lo imitano, creando disordine.| Pingu è un tipo un po' scatenato quando si tratta di andare in slitta.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu è geloso delle attenzioni che riceve la sorella malata... così finge di essere malato anche lui! | Pingu e Pinga decidono di fare uno scherzo a sorpresa alla mamma mettendo Pinga in una vecchia scatola. | Pingu è invitato a una festa di compleanno, ma non vuole che anche Pinga ci vada.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: L'insegnante di Pingu sta mostrando alla classe come creare forme di cartapesta, e Pingu e i suoi amici ne sono colpiti. | Pingu non ne ha mai abbastanza dei suoi snack al pesce preferiti. | Papà dà a Pingu una lezione di guida, ma Pingu rompe accidentalmente la leva della velocità.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vuole un nuovo giocattolo, ma la mamma non glielo compra mentre fanno la spesa. | Pingu è incaricato di prendersi cura dell'animale della scuola. È un granchio scontroso a cui non piace Pingu. | Pingu semina il caos quando è costretto ad accompagnare la mamma al salone di bellezza.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Quando Pinga si batte il dito del piede, Pingu si diverte un mondo a fasciare il piede dolorante e a farla ridacchiare. | Pingu trova un flauto magico, ma nessuno sembra apprezzare i suoi rumorosi fischi... tranne i pesci! | Pingi sembra preferire giocare con Pingo che con Pingu.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu promette di catturare un pesce GRANDE per la mamma, ma nei buchi per la pesca, pesca solo spazzatura! | Pingu gioca con le bretelle del nonno, correndo finché l'elastico non lo tira indietro. | Pingu ottiene un lavoro come giornalaio e non vede l'ora di iniziare.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sta dipingendo quando rovescia accidentalmente della vernice rossa e la situazione sfugge rapidamente al controllo. | Pingu vede un nuovo monopattino, ma Pingg lo compra per primo! | Pingu prova a tuffarsi per impressionare gli amici, ma scopre che non è affatto facile come sembra!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu vuole far credere a Pinga che ci sia un abominevole uomo delle nevi in giro per l'Antartide. | Pingu sente una nuova canzone alla radio e non ne ha mai abbastanza. | Un amico di Pingu porta a scuola un aeroplanino a elastico e Pingu sostituisce l'elastico in modo che l'aereo voli più lontano.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Tom il carro attrezzi è l'ingegnoso piccolo aiutante di Car City. È il primo a essere chiamato quando i suoi amici hanno bisogno di riparazioni e cure.

programme.title: Squadra di soccorso estiva
programme.desc: Unisciti alle nostre auto preferite di CarCity in questa avventura estiva sulla spiaggia, tra salvataggi in acqua e giochi sulla sabbia.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: La Squadra Costruzioni costruisce Car City mattone dopo mattone! Sono la prova che tutto è possibile con un piccolo aiuto da parte dei nostri amici.

programme.title: Ethan the Dump Truck
programme.desc: Chi ha detto che imparare non può essere divertente? Ethan è un piccolo e coraggioso camioncino che scopre colori, forme e altro ancora giocando.

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Incontra i Monster Trucks, una banda di auto colossali e laboriose che si alleano per aiutare i loro amici e la comunità di Monster City.

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Tutti a bordo del treno dell'apprendimento! Ted è un treno che insegna ai bambini i colori, gli animali, la frutta, la verdura e molto altro.

programme.desc: Tom il carro attrezzi è l'ingegnoso piccolo aiutante di Car City. È il primo a essere chiamato quando i suoi amici hanno bisogno di riparazioni e cure.

programme.desc: Fermati nel negozio di verniciatura di Tom il carro attrezzi! Questo piccolo pittore creativo sarà felice di aggiornare e dare un nuovo look ai suoi amici.

programme.title: Say Hello to Our New Neighbors
programme.desc: Hello, hello! A new neighbor has moved in! Who could this new neighbor be? And what might they look like? Please welcome the Minjee family, who will be making new friends with the Bebepin family!

programme.title: Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Look what we found! Our friends have discovered mysterious, colorful dinosaur eggs! Place them in the magic incubator and watch them change colors. What kind of mighty dinosaurs will hatch from these rainbow eggs? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Super Safeguard Sammy
programme.desc: Help me, Sammy!' Our hero Sammy is here to rescue friends in need! Explore safety tips through lively rhymes and engaging games. Let’s get started!

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play
programme.desc: Welcome to Baby Shark Hospital, where Dr. Baby Shark will take care of you!

programme.title: Bebefinn Weather Song
programme.desc: What’s the weather like today? Sunny, rainy, windy, or snowy—there are so many kinds of weather to explore! Let’s learn all about weather with Bebefinn!

programme.title: Baby Shark Boulevard
programme.desc: Baby Shark, the beloved global star, is on the move! To meet fans from all around the world, Baby Shark is setting out on an exciting journey. Join the adventure and meet Baby Shark!

programme.title: Baby Shark Back to School
programme.desc: After an exciting summer vacation, Baby Shark is back at school! Join Baby Shark for a day in the life after the new school term begins.

programme.title: Learn Shapes with Squid & Baby Shark
programme.desc: Learning and drawing shapes become easy with Pinkfong Shape Songs

programme.title: Bebefinn Boo Boo Song
programme.desc: Ouch, ouch, it hurts! Help me! I was running and playing outside today! Ouch! I got hurt while running fast and sliding down the slide. Mommy, Daddy! Please make it better so it doesn’t hurt anymore!

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.desc: What is waiting for us in Hoi's Playground, today? Visit Hoi's Playground for an awesome play time full of fun songs and learning activities!

programme.title: Baby Shark Party Time
programme.desc: Let’s have a fun sing-along party with Baby Shark! Sing along to 'Baby Sharkcito'!

programme.title: 100 Little Ninimos
programme.desc: Shall we go meet Ninimo's cat friends, each with their own unique traits?

programme.title: Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.desc: Join the Bebefinn family and meet five friendly farm animals! From cows and ducks to sheep, pigs, and bunnies—it’s time to wiggle, shake, and dance along! Are you ready to move like an animal?

programme.title: Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.desc: Join the Bebefinn family and meet five friendly farm animals! From cows and ducks to sheep, pigs, and bunnies—it’s time to wiggle, shake, and dance along! Are you ready to move like an animal?

programme.title: Baby Shark Tell Me How You Feel
programme.desc: A story about a Baby Shark and his friends sharing their feelings and moods throughout the day.

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: That shiny crown should be mine...! Billi wants Pinkfong's crown and creates a fake detective test to lure Wonderstar. If Wonderstar wins, they will receive a golden badge but if not, the crown will be gone. The test now begins! Wonder... star? Can you help me dance again? programme.desc: Un altro membro degli Ebon Rider minaccia il nuovo Rider del Villaggio di Hakum, mentre Lute e i suoi amici incontrano un vecchio amico e scoprono il "Rito dell'Evocazione".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mentre cercano Avinia, Cheval e Cryo si imbattono in un altro Ebon Rider, Shadow, il cui Nargacuga si muove più veloce della luce.

programme.desc: Nariki, stanco da una sessione di allenamento e da una discussione con il suo Monstie, incontra inaspettatamente l'ultimo dei Quattro Sommi Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Debli è deciso a fare la sua parte nell'operazione di salvataggio della sua amica Avinia e si prepara per il Rito di Evocazione. Aspetta, ma da quando è un Rider?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute sa esattamente quale mostro vorrebbe usare per il suo primo Rito di Evocazione. Nel frattempo, i Rider Oscuri fanno di tutto per trovarlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È il turno di Cheval di andare a cercare un potente mostro per aumentare le abilità di Rathi, ma non è pronto per la lunga e fredda traversata delle Distese Innevate di Darj.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On

programme.desc: Gli Orsetti del Cuore decollano nello spazio dopo che un UFO gigante inizia a rubare tutta la cura proveniente dalla Terra. È la prima avventura galattica degli orsetti mentre respingono alieni sciocchi e cercano di salvare Tantamore prima che scompaia per sempre!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Che i giochi abbiano inizio! Un malvagio mago di nome Senza Cuore mette gli Orsetti del Cuore contro la Banda dei Cattivi in una serie di giochi contorti. L'unica speranza degli orsetti è usare il potere della cura per battere Senza Cuore al suo stesso gioco!

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Elle - L'ultima Cenerentola
programme.desc: Un tempo Elle sognava di diventare una cantante famosa, ma ora vive a Los Angeles e lavora per un'etichetta discografica. Un giorno incontra il giovane Ty Parker, una stella del pop. Con l'aiuto dei suoi amici, Elle scoprirà che i sogni possono davvero diventare realtà.

programme.title: Team Hot Wheels: La nascita di un mito
programme.desc: Nella cittá piú tranquilla del mondo, quattro ragazzi fortunati scopriranno che la vita è piú divertente quando si va a tutto gas! Gage, Wyatt, Brandon e Rhett sono nati per correre. Da soli sono piloti abilissimi, ma insieme diventano Il Team Hot Wheels®!

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Ein legendärer Auftritt einer Hardrock-Legende in Hamburg! Diese Aufnahme vereint frisches Material mit zeitlosen Klassikern. Eine musikalische Reise durch mehr als dreißig Jahre Rockgeschichte, die pure Energie und Nostalgie verspricht.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Storie di cucina marchigiana
programme.desc: Nella provincia di Ancona Daniele un produttore di legumi e un custode di un orto antico per realizzare un piatto legato alla tradizione religiosa

programme.title: Del pane non butto via niente
programme.desc: Pane a lievito ep1 - Francesco Guida, segue le orme del padre. Il pane a lievito che impasta è il pane comune, quello più facile da reperire e più veloce da realizzare. Un pane buonissimo e fragrante che va mangiato appena sfornato.

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Polinesia
programme.desc: Tahiti - Il viaggio di Giovanni in Polinesia comincia a Tahiti, all’interno dove le montagne arrivano a 2000 mt. Noci, anguille, cocco e tonno bianco. Ma oggi c’è anche una grossa influenza asiatica e si può facilmente assaggiare cibo cinese

programme.title: Parola di chef S9
programme.desc: Marco Bernardo - Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficolta', aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Come è profondo il mare Eolie
programme.desc: Vulcano - l'entroterra - Vulcano, il verde oltre al blu. Qui non c’è solo il mare e l’entroterra con i suoi colori, la sua vegetazione e il vulcano ancora attivo affascinano Gianfranco. E poi i produttori di tonno e di capperi solleticano l’estro dello chef in cucina.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: A symbol of comfort and city pride, the Philly cheesesteak continues to inspire fresh imagination. Thin-sliced steak, melting cheese, and griddled bread set the foundation as new flavors and regional twists bring this iconic sandwich into a new era of creativity.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Baking host Jessica McGovern warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats to comfort you on a rainy day.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Baking is indulgent - especially when making rich and delicious treats! Host Jessica McGovern shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: For this "N" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas works with noodles and nectarines. For her first dish, Lauren cooks up a breaded nectarine and mozzarella stack. Talking technique, she shows us how to cut nectarines into rounds. She does the same with some soft mozzarella and then walks us through the art of a balsamic reduction. For the noodles, Chef Lauren puts an elegant twist on your childhood favourite with a lobster mac and cheese. She spares no flavours, adding fried bacon, garlic, cayenne pepper, mustard powder, and even dry vermouth. This is no ordinary noodle dish. But now for the real challenge! Chef Lauren works with the noodles and nectarines.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Culinary expert Theresa Visintin picks the letter "B" and must combine beef with buttermilk for her challenge. But first, she works with the ingredients separately. Silky buttermilk lends itself perfectly to Theresa's battered blooming onion recipe. Using the biggest onion she can find, Theresa skillfully slices from the root down, ensuring it will bloom into a beautiful flower. She coats the Vidalia onion in egg, buttermilk and smoky spiced flour, before deep frying it. Next up, it's time for beef to get the Theresa treatment, as she prepares a crowd favourite- smoky, juicy, fall-off-thebone baked beef brisket. With the perfect balance of sweet and spicy, this meal will make you look forward to leftovers...if there are any! Now for the challenge - Theresa skillfully blends beef with buttermilk in a recipe that will tempt your taste buds.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: After picking "M" for this episode's challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic using maple and mahi-mahi. She starts by combining chestnut and quinoa to create a mouth-watering medley, rich in flavour and texture. Chef Lauren adds shiitake mushrooms and drizzles the dish with a balsamic vinegar, maple syrup and rosemary dressing. Next up, she steams Mahi-mahi with red chilies and lemongrass, this savoury spice is a heavenly combination with an invigorating aroma. For the challenge, Chef Lauren seamlessly introduces both maple and mahimahi into one flavourful fusion.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Talented baker Jessica McGovern takes us around the world with diverse desserts from countries like Japan and Germany.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Picnics are fun, elegant, and filled with delicious food! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourite picnic-ready desserts.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: "A" is on the menu and Chef Robert Jewell takes on this meal challenge with apricots and avocados. First up, Robert cooks a spicy roasted quail and drizzles it with some sweet apricot and calvados sauce. Next, is a meal best served cold! Robert slices up sushi-grade tuna and transforms it into a flavourful tartare, brought to life by rich avocado and refreshing lime. On the side, he adds crusty crostini with savoury soy sauce and sesame oil, the perfect complement for this meltin- your-mouth meal. For his final dish, Robert combines apricots and avocados for an unbelievably tasty dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin picks the letter “D” in this challenge and combines two very different ingredients – dill and duck! But that’s no big dill for Theresa. For her first dish, Theresa uses dill seeds and weed to make a hearty, creamy dill pickle soup. She adds chicken broth and potatoes as her base but makes the soup extra smooth with some sour cream. She tops the soup with dill pickles to add a delightful crunch. Next, Theresa takes duck, a classic French ingredient, and gives it a French Canadian twist – duck tourtière. Using the duck fat to fry up some veggies, she adds red wine to her chicken stock and simmers the meat. Then, Theresa fills a pie crust with this delightful duck filling and coats the crust with egg wash before baking it to a golden brown. Finally, Theresa takes on both ingredients to create a delectable dill and duck dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Showcasing the unique flavours of endive and eggplant, Chef Lauren Gulyas receives the letter "E" for her cooking challenge. She sets sail by creating an endive salad boat, the perfect delivery vessel for her smoked trout with creÌ€me fraiche, and goat cheese with walnut appetizers. She follows up with a stuffed baby eggplant, Moroccan style! Chef Lauren sauteÌs onion and garlic with some smoky sweet paprika and a snip of savoury sage, the aromatic combination lends itself beautifully to the succulent flavour of lamb. For her grand finale, Chef Lauren prepares the pieÌ€ce de reÌsistance using both endive and eggplant.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts is all about the often forgotten seeds as he shows how much flavor they can add to sole and squid.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Super Tonics by Meredith Youngson! Follow along as Shahir prepares healthy, delicious beverages and foods including brownie batter chia pudding, a blue lavender latte, chai cinnamon roll baked oatmeal, and much more!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this "C" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell cooks up recipes using coconut and crab before combining both into a single recipe. Using sweet coconut, Robert makes a classic dessert -- an irresistible coconut cream pie. He starts with a delectable crunchy graham cracker crust and tops his pie with fluffy whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes. Next, Robert transforms a fresh soft-shell crab into a delicious, spicy, and crunchy dish. The best part? It's fast and easy to make. After soaking the crab in milk, Robert dunks it into a flour-cornmeal mixture and fries it until golden brown. But that's not all, Robert whips up the perfect dipping sauce, using spicy smoked- jalapeno, lime, and orange adobo mayo. Finally, Robert brings coconut and crab into one delicious dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Charming host Vijaya Selvaraju demystifies a number of Indian dishes like Dal Soup in a crockpot and Fish in (three-ingredient) Red Chili Chutney.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and served with Wasabi Champ Potato. Now that's a CombiNation Plate!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares some of his favorite street foods that feature coconut, including Coconut Roti Flatbreads from Sri Lanka, God’s Bread from Portugal, and Mango Coconut Sticky Rice from Thailand.

programme.title: The new era of design

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: The relaxing vibe of a day at the beach, with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Return to Paradise 1
programme.desc: Featuring the hidden exotic Fijian island of Nanuku, a tiny, palm-covered, sandy atoll surrounded by lagoons brimming with sea life; some aerial drone clips give perspective from above.

programme.title: Mount Cook: New Zealand
programme.desc: Taking in the rugged beauty of snow-capped mountains and calm emerald waters.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Flying Over Maui
programme.desc: Soaring high above Maui, Hawaii's exotic coastline and lush interior.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Redwood Forest Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Transporting to the magical redwood forests of Northern California and soaking up the healing energies that only pure nature can provide, with multiple healing scenes from the old-grove forest, paired with real-life stereo nature sounds.

programme.title: Lake Brunner & Paringa: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring a lakeside getaway.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: A tropical island paradise to relax in. A one-hour-long high definition nature experience of two different remote islands hidden in the south Pacific.

programme.title: A Day in Mt Rainier 1
programme.desc: Journeying to hidden sections of Mount Rainier National Park in Washington state with pure nature sounds for relaxation.

programme.title: Ninety Mile Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The almost never-ending paradise of one of New Zealand's most breathtaking beaches.

programme.title: Mount Cook: New Zealand
programme.desc: Taking in the rugged beauty of snow-capped mountains and calm emerald waters.

programme.title: Moraine Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Moraine Lake in Banff National Park.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Ruby Beach Sunset
programme.desc: Relax for a full hour as a golden, soothing sunset slowly unfolds and turns to dusk as seen from Ruby Beach, on Washington state's Olympic Peninsula; you'll be lulled into a state of tranquil relaxation thanks to the sounds of rhythmic ocean waves gently crashing over the pebbly beach paired with the dazzling collage of four different sunset scenes shot in 4K.

programme.title: Hamurana Springs
programme.desc: A nature reserve on North Island.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego
programme.desc: Featuring 12 different 15-minute scenes from the San Diego's beaches, Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines and more.

programme.title: Flying Over Greece
programme.desc: Journey through the landscapes of Greece from a bird's-eye-view.

programme.desc: The rugged yet relaxing sounds of powerful waves breaking on a secluded white-sandy beach in Cabo San Lucas.

programme.title: Paradise Palms
programme.desc: Paradise Palms

programme.desc: A new day dawns on Hawaii's Pa'ako beach as waves crash on the shore.

programme.desc: The shoreline of Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Golden Hour in Paradise
programme.desc: A 4K UHD video collage with soft instrumental music from one moment in paradise to the next, with ambient nature sounds and soft music for deep relaxation.

programme.title: Blue Horizons
programme.desc: Featuring a diverse set of blue nature scenes from places like Hawaii, Mexico, Canada and California paired with a custom ambient track by Travis Revell.

programme.title: Santa Ynez Valley: California
programme.desc: Take a walk in the idyllic valley and enjoy calming sights of mature trees, and endless skies.

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it!

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Iceland From Above
programme.desc: Trace the contours of Iceland's rugged landscape from a bird's eye view. Shaped by millions of years of volcanic activity, expect to see fjords, craters, canyons, and more.

programme.title: Above & Under
programme.desc: Flying above beachy shores; diving deep into crystal-clear waters brimming with sea creatures.

programme.title: Relaxing Nature Sceneries
programme.desc: The filmmaker provides a collection of peaceful nature scenes and tranquil vistas that will soothe body and soul.

programme.title: Tranquil Waters: Diablo River
programme.desc: A majestic view of the Diablo River which is surrounded by evergreen mountains.

programme.title: Pa'ako Beach, Hawaii, U.S
programme.desc: A new day dawns on Hawaii's Pa'ako beach as waves crash on the shore.

programme.desc: Experiencing the tranquil waters of a laid-back marina tucked away in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Boardwalk to the Beach: Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Strolling on the boardwalk to the turquoise waters in Le Gosier, Guadeloupe.

programme.title: Tiga Warna Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Exploring the many faces of a breathtaking beach in Indonesia.

programme.title: Peaceful Forest Walk: Quebec
programme.desc: The heart of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Snake Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Flying away to paradise and exploring the lush forests and turquoise waters of Snake Island, in the Philippines.

programme.title: Forest in the Sea
programme.desc: Explore the kelp forest off the California coast, that supports more than 100,000 creatures.

programme.title: Wenderholm & Scandretts Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: Scenery of scenic regional parks with their coastal forests and rocky bluffs that border spectacular ocean views.

programme.title: Crystal Waterfalls of Croatia
programme.desc: The Plitvice Lakes National Park.

programme.title: Calming Mountain Waterfall
programme.desc: A fixed-angle one hour long nature scene of the beautiful Tangle Falls in Jasper National Park, paired with real stereo nature sounds shot on location; although it's a static video, there are a lot of dynamic elements.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: An aerial journey to the remote fjords and valleys of eastern Iceland.

programme.title: Torrey Pines State Reserve, La Jolla, California
programme.desc: Watch the sunset in The Torrey Pines State Reserve in La Jolla, California.

programme.title: Bayahibe Pier: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Taking a break on the idyllic Bayahibe Pier in the Dominican Republic to enjoy its hushed seaside and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Pass Island: Phillipines
programme.desc: Exploring a paradise home with white sandy beaches and crystal-clear waters.

programme.title: Lover's Island & Entalula Beach
programme.desc: Powder-white beaches and shimmering waters.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: MEMOIRS JUNE 24
programme.desc: MEMOIRS JUNE 24

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Traditional and modern flavors combined with sheftalia, the classic Cypriot sausage made with chicken mince, paired with a refreshing lemon cheesecake mousse for dessert. A delicious blend of savory heritage and sweet indulgence that celebrates Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Mediterranean Kitchen Spain
programme.desc: Mediterranean Kitchen is a flavourful tour of the Mediterranean, and the dishes, ingredients and traditions that make it one of the most celebrated cuisines in the world. Each episode features authentic recipes, local specialities and the stories behind the food, highlighting the diverse culinary cultures across the region. From seaside seafood feasts to rustic family recipes, Mediterranean Kitchen brings the tastes and traditions of the Mediterranean to your screen.

programme.title: Med Minds 03 Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra, the last Pharaoh of Egypt, captivated empires with her intelligence, charm, and enduring influence.

programme.title: MEMOIRS JUNE 24
programme.desc: MEMOIRS JUNE 24

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: MED DST MAKARSKA 15MIN
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.title: Marvels of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Marvels of the Mediterranean: Cairo Museum of Coptic Art explores the rich heritage of Coptic Christianity in Egypt. The episode showcases ancient artefacts, manuscripts, and artworks that blend Egyptian, Greek, and Roman influences. It delves into the museum’s role in preserving this unique cultural legacy. Through its collections, the documentary highlights the artistic and spiritual history of Coptic civilisation.

programme.title: MEMOIRS JUNE 24
programme.desc: MEMOIRS JUNE 24

programme.title: Greek Myths: Hades - A Reluctant King
programme.desc: Greek Myths: Hades - A Reluctant King

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats on Food and Culinary Delights
programme.desc: Taste the Mediterranean this week on Whats On. Malta celebrates with Festa Frawli, the Malta International Food Festival, and Festival Ikel Malti. Slovenia serves fine dining at Gourmet Ljubljana, while Italy CousCous Festival blends flavors and cultures. Join us as we explore street food, markets, and culinary workshops that highlight the region rich gastronomic heritage.

programme.title: Makarska

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Milan
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Milan, in northern Italy’s Lombardy region. Known for its chic style, stunning architecture, delicious food, and world-class art, Milan stands out as one of Europe’s most fashionable and sophisticated cities.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Wake up your Body
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: MEMOIRS JUNE 25
programme.desc: MEMOIRS JUNE 25

programme.title: Whats On Books Literature Innovation and Learning
programme.desc: Great ideas are the lifeblood of the Mediterranean and this week we are following them from the written page to the boardroom. We start at the Malta Book Festival, where the local community gathers to celebrate the stories that define the islands. Our journey then takes us to Cyprus for the Nicosia Book Fest to see how literature creates a unique bridge between cultures. In Spain, we wander the famous leafy avenues of the Madrid Book Fair, where Retiro Park becomes one of the largest outdoor libraries in the world. We wrap up at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for the EU Startup Summit, where the creative energy of storytelling meets the high-stakes world of global innovation. This is a look at the parks and the halls where the next chapter of the Mediterranean is being written.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Lebanon
programme.desc: Malini travels through Lebanon, exploring some of the country’s most beautiful sites, including Baalbek, Jeita Grotto, Harissa, Byblos, Batroun, and Tripoli.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Med Nations 07 Croatia
programme.desc: Sail along the stunning Adriatic coast of Croatia. From the medieval streets of Dubrovnik to sunlit islands and crystal-clear waters, Croatia reveals a rich tapestry of history, culture, and seaside traditions that make it a Mediterranean gem.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Start Your Day Gently
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.title: MED DST MAKARSKA 15MIN
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.title: Whats On Books Literature Innovation and Learning
programme.desc: Great ideas are the lifeblood of the Mediterranean and this week we are following them from the written page to the boardroom. We start at the Malta Book Festival, where the local community gathers to celebrate the stories that define the islands. Our journey then takes us to Cyprus for the Nicosia Book Fest to see how literature creates a unique bridge between cultures. In Spain, we wander the famous leafy avenues of the Madrid Book Fair, where Retiro Park becomes one of the largest outdoor libraries in the world. We wrap up at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for the EU Startup Summit, where the creative energy of storytelling meets the high-stakes world of global innovation. This is a look at the parks and the halls where the next chapter of the Mediterranean is being written.

programme.desc: Malini Angelica heads to Alexandria, Egypt’s Mediterranean city, exploring its blend of Greek, Roman, and Egyptian history. With a lively student scene, fresh seafood, and a relaxed seaside vibe, she discovers why Alexandria is an underrated, modern-feeling escape.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

It's a journey through a country that has had a profound impact on art, cuisine, and culture throughout the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Whats On Special and Unique Festivals
